{{Quote|Chempa'i Para'du|a sentence in Dashadi|<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Dashadi''' was the official [[Language/Legends|language]] of [[Urkupp]]. It was used by the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] native [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Dashade/Legends|Dashades]].<ref name="UA" />

Since the destruction of Urkupp in [[3996 BBY]], apparently there had been only one<ref name="UA" /> or a small number of active Dashades at a single time.<ref name="fall">''[[The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen]]''</ref> As Dashadi had never been a widely-used language beyond Urkupp, its speakers had increasingly seen the advantages of using [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] to communicate with other species.<ref name="UA" />

[[Ket Maliss]] was the last known speaker of Dashadi, although some people thought that the Dashades might have survived the destruction of their planet by building hidden colonies throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="UA" />

{{Language-stub}}
